moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles finals set for Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Who's lifting the trophy? It's Wimbledon finals weekend, with all eyes on Centre Court for the climactic matches.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Can a Brit make history today or tomorrow? The tension is building as Wimbledon draws to a close.

angles.name: Sunday Showdown
angles.copy: Get ready for Grand Slam glory! The Wimbledon finals are upon us, promising a thrilling end to two weeks of tennis.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final Looms
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America culminates next Sunday, July 19, with the final match in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Just one week to go until the FIFA World Cup 2026 final! Who do you predict will be battling for glory?

angles.name: Global Showdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is almost here! The World Cup final is next Sunday. Which nations are you rooting for?

angles.name: Finals Fever
angles.copy: World Cup fever is building! The 2026 final is next Sunday, July 19th. Get ready for an epic showdown.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Major Golf
angles.copy: The Open Championship is back! Royal Birkdale hosts golf's oldest major from Thursday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: All eyes on Royal Birkdale this week as The Open Championship gets underway. The world's best golfers descend on Southport.

angles.name: British Golf
angles.copy: It's Open Championship week! The iconic Royal Birkdale is set to host a thrilling four days of golf starting Thursday.

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is currently underway, having started on July 4 in Barcelona and running until July 26.

angles.name: Cycling Action
angles.copy: The peloton is battling it out! The Tour de France is in full swing, with exciting stages happening daily.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Watch
angles.copy: Who's wearing yellow today? Catch all the drama and breathtaking scenery as the Tour de France continues.

moments.title: Wireless Festival Cancelled
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival 2026, scheduled for July 10-12 in London, has been cancelled due to headliner Ye being denied entry to the UK.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: Major news for music fans: Wireless Festival 2026 has been cancelled. What are your thoughts on this year's festival season?

angles.name: London Gigs
angles.copy: Huge disappointment for London festival-goers as Wireless Festival is off. Were you planning to go?

angles.name: Cancellation Impact
angles.copy: The cancellation of Wireless Festival is making waves. How does this affect your summer plans?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a major UK music and arts event, returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Henham Park in Suffolk will be buzzing with music, comedy, and arts from July 23-26.

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating two decades of discovery! Latitude Festival returns next week. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Latitude! Four days of incredible music and culture awaits in Suffolk. Are you going?

moments.title: Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival is currently in full swing, running from July 10-19, showcasing a diverse range of talent across Scotland's capital.

angles.name: Jazz in Edinburgh
angles.copy: Live music fills the air in Edinburgh! The Jazz & Blues Festival is happening now until July 19. Catch some incredible performances.

angles.name: Scottish Culture
angles.copy: Experience the best of jazz and blues at Edinburgh's vibrant festival, ongoing this week. Who's your favourite jazz artist?

moments.title: Bristol Harbour Festival Returns
moments.blurb: The free Bristol Harbour Festival brings a weekend of music, markets, and maritime fun to Bristol's historic harbourside from July 17-19.

angles.name: Bristol Event
angles.copy: Get ready for a fantastic weekend in Bristol! The Harbour Festival kicks off next Friday, July 17, with free music and fun.

angles.name: Free Festival
angles.copy: Bristol Harbour Festival is back! Three days of music, markets, and maritime celebrations starting next Friday.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings a celebration of Celtic, folk, and traditional music to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, from July 15-18.

angles.name: Celtic Music
angles.copy: Immerse yourself in Celtic culture! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts next Wednesday in Stornoway. Who's heading to the Isles?

angles.name: Island Festival
angles.copy: Experience incredible folk and traditional music at the Hebridean Celtic Festival from July 15-18. A unique island event!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Latest
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart updated yesterday, Friday, July 10, revealing the latest top tracks and new entries.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: The latest Official UK Singles Chart is in! What's at number one this week? Any big new entries catching your ear?

angles.name: New Music Friday Aftermath
angles.copy: Chart update! The UK Singles Chart just dropped yesterday. Which new tracks are climbing the ranks and which hits are holding strong?

moments.title: Happy 30th to Alessia Cara
moments.blurb: Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara, known for hits like 'Here' and 'Scars to Your Beautiful,' turns 30 today.

angles.name: Pop Star Milestone
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Alessia Cara, who turns 30 today! What's your favourite track from the Canadian hitmaker?

moments.title: Happy 51st to Lil' Kim
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and fashion icon Lil' Kim, a pioneer in hip-hop, celebrates her 51st birthday today.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Happy birthday to the Queen Bee herself, Lil' Kim, turning 51 today! Celebrate with your favourite track from the legend.

moments.title: Happy 67th to Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Legendary Bon Jovi guitarist and songwriter Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Bon Jovi's iconic guitarist, Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi anthem?

moments.title: Happy 67th to Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her distinctive folk-inspired sound and hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner,' turns 67 today.

angles.name: Folk Pop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the incredible Suzanne Vega! Her timeless songs continue to captivate. Which one is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 42nd to Gareth Gates
moments.blurb: Pop singer Gareth Gates, who rose to fame on Pop Idol, celebrates his 42nd birthday tomorrow, July 12.

angles.name: Pop Idol Star
angles.copy: Get ready to sing 'Anyone of Us'! Happy 42nd birthday tomorrow to Gareth Gates, the Pop Idol runner-up who stole hearts.

moments.title: Happy 74th to Liz Mitchell
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of iconic disco group Boney M., turns 74 tomorrow, July 12.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Rasputin! Daddy Cool! Happy 74th birthday tomorrow to Boney M.'s incredible lead vocalist, Liz Mitchell. What's your favourite Boney M. hit?

moments.title: Happy 84th to Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, the legendary singer-songwriter and guitarist for The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on Monday, July 13.

angles.name: Folk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Turn! Turn! Turn! Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to The Byrds' visionary, Roger McGuinn, on Monday. A true legend.

moments.title: Happy 39th to Dan Reynolds
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the charismatic frontman of multi-platinum rock band Imagine Dragons, turns 39 on Tuesday, July 14.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Frontman
angles.copy: Thunder! Feel the thunder! Happy 39th birthday on Tuesday to Imagine Dragons' dynamic lead singer, Dan Reynolds. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: The iconic singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Her voice defined generations. Which song is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 36th to Olly Alexander
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, the lead singer of Years & Years and recent Eurovision star, turns 36 on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th birthday to the fabulous Olly Alexander on Wednesday! From Years & Years to Eurovision, he's a true pop force.

moments.title: Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the influential drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Don't Stand So Close to Me! Happy 74th birthday on Thursday to The Police's drumming maestro, Stewart Copeland. Rock legend!

moments.title: Happy 50th to Luke Bryan
moments.blurb: Country superstar Luke Bryan, known for his chart-topping hits and electrifying live shows, turns 50 on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Country Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to country music icon Luke Bryan on Friday! Raise a glass to the 'Country Girl' hitmaker.

moments.title: Happy 85th to Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha Reeves & The Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on Saturday, July 18.

angles.name: Motown Queen
angles.copy: Dancing in the Street! Happy 85th birthday on Saturday to the magnificent Martha Reeves, a true Motown icon.

moments.title: Happy 79th to Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, turns 79 on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Rock God
angles.copy: We Will Rock You! A very happy 79th birthday on Sunday to Queen's incomparable guitarist, Brian May. What's your favourite Queen riff?

moments.title: Happy 33rd to Fred again..
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning DJ and producer Fred again.. celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Dance Music Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday on Sunday to the incredible Fred again..! Whose set are you hoping to catch him play next?

moments.title: Happy 79th to Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his pioneering fusion of rock and Latin music, turns 79 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Smooth! Happy 79th birthday on Monday to the one and only Carlos Santana. What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Happy 45th to Paloma Faith
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Paloma Faith, known for her distinctive retro-soul sound, celebrates her 45th birthday on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Soulful Star
angles.copy: Happy 45th birthday on Tuesday to the incredible Paloma Faith! Which of her powerful ballads is your go-to?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for many regions across the UK, including England and Wales, officially begin around Monday, July 20.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: Hooray for no more school runs! Summer holidays begin for many UK schools from Monday. What are your big plans?

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are almost here for UK students! Time for fun, sun, and adventures. What are you looking forward to most?

angles.name: Local Holiday Vibes
angles.copy: The long-awaited summer break starts next week for many local schools! Let the good times roll!
